mapper.sql: p.emp_plan_id, p.pair_sn, p.dprtr_cntry_cd, p.arvl_cntry_cd, p.intl_yn, p.exempt_cd, p.use_bgng_dt, p.use_end_dt, p.frst_reg_dt, p.frst_reg_user_id, p.last_chg_dt, p.last_chg_user_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM emp.tn_emp_cntry_pair p WHERE p.emp_plan_id = #{empPlanId} AND NOW() BETWEEN p.use_bgng_dt AND p.use_end_dt ORDER BY p.pair_sn ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp.tn_emp_cntry_pair (emp_plan_id, pair_sn, dprtr_cntry_cd, arvl_cntry_cd, intl_yn, exempt_cd, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{empPlanId}, #{pairSn}, #{dprtrCntryCd}, #{arvlCntryCd}, COALESCE(#{intlYn}, 'Y'), #{exemptCd}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})

INSERT INTO emp.tn_emp_cntry_pair (emp_plan_id, pair_sn, dprtr_cntry_cd, arvl_cntry_cd, intl_yn, exempt_cd, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) SELECT #{dstEmpPlanId}, pair_sn, dprtr_cntry_cd, arvl_cntry_cd, intl_yn, exempt_cd, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId} FROM emp.tn_emp_cntry_pair WHERE emp_plan_id = #{srcEmpPlanId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
